Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We are asked to produce two POWL models based on the description of a hiring process at GlobalTeq Solutions

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: First lets understand the steps from the description

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: An automated system scans resumes If information is missing it triggers a loop where the applicant is asked to provide additional details We can model this as a loop first do ResumeParsing or DataCompletenessCheck and if incomplete do RequestMoreInfo and then go back to the check until complete

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: After the resume is complete the applicant takes a skill test This is a sequential step

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: This step has an XOR choice The description says This step is often an XOR choice in the process either you go through a standard cultural fit assessment or you take a path where community affiliation leads to implicit score adjustments So we model it as an XOR between two branches one is the standard CulturalFitCheck and the other is a CommunityAffiliationCheck which gives an advantage

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: After the cultural fit check there is a managerial review and then a final decision These two can be sequential

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Now we need to create two models

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Model 1 with potential unfairness This model includes the XOR branch for the cultural fit and community affiliation check

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Model 2 without unfairness This model does not have the XOR branch Instead all applicants go through the same cultural fit evaluation

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: We are to use activity labels as suggested ReceiveApplication though the description does not explicitly say but we can include it as the first step DataCompletenessCheck RequestMoreInfo SkillAssessment CulturalFitCheck CommunityAffiliationCheck ManagerialReview FinalDecision

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: However note that the description starts with receiving applications but the first automated step is the resume parsing and data check We can assume that ReceiveApplication is the initial activity then we have the loop for data completeness

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Lets define the steps For Model 1 Step 1 ReceiveApplication initial step Step 2 DataCompletenessCheck which is a loop with RequestMoreInfo Step 3 SkillAssessment Step 4 XOR between CulturalFitCheck and CommunityAffiliationCheck Step 5 ManagerialReview Step 6 FinalDecision

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: But note the loop for data completeness is described as if the resume is incomplete then request more info and then go back to the check So we can model it as a loop where the first child is the check and the second child is the request for more info

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: In POWL a loop is defined as OperatorPOWL operator equals Operator LOOP children equals A and B meaning execute A then either exit or execute B and then A again

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So for the data completeness loop A equals DataCompletenessCheck B equals RequestMoreInfo Then after the loop is completed we proceed to the next steps

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We also have to consider the order of the steps The process is mostly sequential but note that the loop is a sequential step that must complete before moving on

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So the overall structure is a partial order with the following nodes ReceiveApplication Loop DataCompletenessCheck RequestMoreInfo SkillAssessment XOR CulturalFitCheck CommunityAffiliationCheck ManagerialReview FinalDecision And the order is ReceiveApplication to loop to SkillAssessment to XOR to ManagerialReview to FinalDecision

Name: Validation - PE
Text: But note the loop itself is a single node in the partial order and it must be completed before SkillAssessment Similarly the XOR is a node that must be completed before ManagerialReview

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Now lets construct the POWL model in code

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Well create the transitions for each activity For the loop we create two transitions DataCompletenessCheck and RequestMoreInfo Then create an OperatorPOWL with operator LOOP and children DataCompletenessCheck and RequestMoreInfo For the XOR we create two transitions CulturalFitCheck and CommunityAffiliationCheck Then create an OperatorPOWL with operator XOR and children CulturalFitCheck and CommunityAffiliationCheck

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Then we create the StrictPartialOrder with nodes ReceiveApplication loop SkillAssessment xor ManagerialReview FinalDecision Then we add edges to reflect the order ReceiveApplication to loop loop to SkillAssessment SkillAssessment to xor xor to ManagerialReview ManagerialReview to FinalDecision

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Now for Model 2 without unfairness We remove the XOR branch and instead have a single CulturalFitCheck So the steps are ReceiveApplication Loop DataCompletenessCheck RequestMoreInfo SkillAssessment CulturalFitCheck only one ManagerialReview FinalDecision

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We create a StrictPartialOrder with these nodes and the same order as above but without the XOR

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Lets write the code accordingly Well write two separate models
